tool.name: ssiamb
tool.description: ambiguous SNV counter from reads mapped to a supplied assembly
tool.command: #import re #set $raw_sample = str($sample_name).strip() #set $derived_from_reads = False #if not $raw_sample #set $raw_sample = str($reads.name).strip() #end if #if not $raw_sample or $raw_sample in ('Unnamed Collection', 'Unnamed_Collection') #set $raw_sample = str($reads.forward.name).strip() #set $derived_from_reads = True #end if #if $derived_from_reads #set $raw_sample = re.sub(r'\.(fastq|fq)(\.gz)?$', '', $raw_sample, flags=re.IGNORECASE) #set $raw_sample = re.sub(r'([._-](r?1|forward))$', '', $raw_sample, flags=re.IGNORECASE) #end if #set $clean_sample = re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+', '_', $raw_sample).strip('._-') #if not $clean_sample #set $clean_sample = 'sample' #end if #set $raw_bbtools_mem = str($advanced.bbtools_mem).strip() #set $clean_bbtools_mem = re.sub(r'[^0-9kKmMgGtT]', '', $raw_bbtools_mem) #set $assembly_path = $assembly #if $assembly.ext == 'fasta.gz' #set $assembly_path = 'contigs.fasta' gzip -dc '$assembly' > '$assembly_path' && #end if mkdir -p outputs && ssiamb self --r1 '$reads.forward' --r2 '$reads.reverse' --assembly '$assembly_path' --sample '$clean_sample' --outdir outputs --threads \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --dp-min '$thresholds.dp_min' --maf-min '$thresholds.maf_min' #if $clean_bbtools_mem --bbtools-mem '$clean_bbtools_mem' #end if

param.name: assembly
param.label: Contigs
param.help: Assembly contigs in FASTA or gzipped FASTA format.

param.name: sample_name
param.label: Sample name
param.help: If empty, the paired collection name is used.

validator.message: Use letters, numbers, spaces, dots, underscores, or hyphens.

param.name: bbtools_mem
param.label: BBTools heap size
param.help: Optional value without -Xmx prefix, for example 4g.

validator.message: Use a positive Java heap size such as 512m, 4g, or 1t.

tool.help: `ssiamb` expects trimmed paired-end reads and a supplied assembly. It maps the reads back to the assembly, calls variants with BBTools, groups same-position VCF records, and counts ambiguous SNV loci using depth and minor allele frequency thresholds.
